reason: 具申 is a valid Korean Sino-Korean term, but it conflicts with plainer existing terms such as 건의. Choose a project-wide terminology policy before changing it; no mechanical replacement is safe.
臣従 is a valid Korean Sino-Korean political term. Its readability versus 종속 must be decided in context; do not bulk-replace from a string scan.
Compatibility glyphs (for example ㏉/㎝/㍘) match the pristine PC Japanese source. Treating them as text corruption would be speculative; verify their rendered glyphs in-game before any change.
当家 has many context-dependent first-person meanings. This batch already has a dedicated audit stream, so it is intentionally excluded from this residual scan.
